overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a high-rise balcony in a futuristic cyberpunk city, overlooking a body of water with a large offshore stadium structure. The scene transitions from an open city view to approaching a glass building entrance, featuring warm golden hour lighting and modern glass architecture characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise residential balcony overlooking waterfront cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated balcony, observing the futuristic city skyline and distant offshore structures

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows along the waterfront
large circular stadium structure built on platforms over the water with glowing lights
tall structural support pillars rising from the water in a linear formation
transparent glass safety railing along the balcony edge with metal frame
tiled walkway surface with reflective properties

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a high-rise balcony during golden hour. To the left, a dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers lines the waterfront, while straight ahead across the water, a massive offshore stadium structure glows in the distance. Tall support pillars rise from the water to the right, and the transparent glass railing provides an unobstructed view of the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront promenade with tropical landscaping

events.description: city skyline recedes from view as the balcony curves, replaced by open water vista with tropical vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved balcony path, passing tropical palm trees planted along the walkway

entered.detail: tropical palm fronds swaying gently on the left side of the balcony pathway
dark glass and steel facade of the high-rise building being walked along

segments.scene_description: As the balcony curves along the building exterior, the city skyline disappears behind and the view opens to the water. A palm tree becomes prominent on the left while the offshore stadium and pillars shift position in the frame. The building's glass facade is now visible on the right as the walkway continues forward.

events.description: camera turns right toward the building interior, away from the open waterfront view
moving into the shadow of the building, natural sunlight diminishes and interior artificial lighting becomes visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass entrance doors of the building, preparing to enter the illuminated interior lobby

entered.detail: large transparent glass doors with reflective surface showing interior lights
illuminated lobby space visible through the glass featuring a circular logo design and warm lighting
massive structural column of the high-rise with dark metallic finish
glowing circular emblem and interior lights visible through the glass facade

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward the building interior, leaving the waterfront view behind. The focus shifts to a glass entrance facade revealing a luxurious interior lobby with warm artificial lighting and a prominent circular logo. The glass railing moves to the left side of the frame as the walkway leads directly to the entrance, with the building's structural column visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a high-rise balcony that transitions from a panoramic city vista to the entrance of a luxurious interior. It begins by walking past a transparent glass railing, overlooking a dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and a massive offshore stadium glowing across the water during golden hour. As the balcony curves, the city skyline recedes and the view opens further toward the water and a prominent palm tree, while the building's glass facade emerges on the right. The camera then turns right, leaving the waterfront behind to approach a glass entrance facade. Finally, the scene shifts toward the building's interior, revealing a warm, artificially lit lobby featuring a prominent circular logo.
